palette_hint: dark navy background (#0f1623) with off-white text (#e8eaf0), teal accent (#00c9a7) for highlights and badges, muted slate (#1e2a3b) for panels
type_style: system monospace for data values and IDs, system sans-serif for labels and headings, medium weight, clinical and dense feel
description: Fleet operations dashboard for a fictional long-haul trucking company called Ironclad Logistics, tracking vehicle status, driver alerts, and performance reports.
constraints: fixed left sidebar (~220px) with dark slate background, company logo text at top, and icon+label nav links; main content area scrolls independently
sticky top bar within the main content area showing page title, a live-clock placeholder (static text), and a notification bell emoji badge
all data tables use full-width layout with alternating row shading (#1e2a3b / #162030), teal left-border on selected rows, and monospace text in numeric columns
stat cards appear in a 4-column grid at the top of overview and reports pages; each card has a label, large numeric value in teal, and a small unit label
alert severity is communicated purely through background color chips: red (#e53a3a) for critical, amber (#e5a23a) for warning, teal (#00c9a7) for info — no icons

page_specs.overview: Four stat cards in a grid show total active vehicles (142), drivers on duty (138), alerts today (7), and average speed (54 mph). Below the cards, a two-column layout: left column holds a 'Live Fleet Status' table listing 8 vehicles with columns for Unit ID, Driver, Route, Status, and Last Ping; right column holds a narrow 'Recent Alerts' feed showing 5 alert entries each with a severity chip, time, and one-line message.
page_specs.vehicles: Three-column layout: a narrow left filter sidebar with checkboxes for Status (Active, Idle, Maintenance, Offline) and Region (North, South, East, West, Central) plus a text search field; a wide center column with a dense table of 15 vehicles including Unit ID, Make/Model, Year, Mileage, Driver Assigned, Status chip, and Last Service date; a narrow right detail panel that shows expanded info for a 'selected' vehicle (Unit #ILC-047) including a block of key-value pairs and a small maintenance history list.
page_specs.alerts: Full-width main area with a sticky filter bar at the top containing three dropdown selects (Severity, Vehicle, Date Range) and a 'Clear Filters' text button. Below, a paginated table of 12 alert rows each with columns: Timestamp, Severity chip, Unit ID, Driver, Alert Type, Location, and a 'Resolve' text-button link. A summary row at the bottom of the table shows counts by severity.
page_specs.reports: Four stat cards at top show month-to-date metrics: Total Miles (284,910), Fuel Cost ($41,220), On-Time Deliveries (94%), and Incidents (3). Below, a two-column layout: left holds a 'Top Routes by Efficiency' table with Route Name, Miles, Avg Fuel Economy, and On-Time %; right holds a 'Driver Performance' table with Driver Name, Trips, Miles Driven, and a Score value in teal monospace. A 'Download CSV' plain text button sits above each table.
page_specs.settings: Two-column layout with a left settings-category sidebar listing six items (Account, Notifications, Integrations, Alert Thresholds, User Management, Billing) with the active item highlighted in teal. The right main panel shows the 'Alert Thresholds' settings form with labeled number inputs for Speed Limit Warning (mph), Idle Time Threshold (minutes), and Maintenance Interval (miles), each on its own row with a field label, input box, and unit label inline; a 'User Management' sub-section below lists a small table of 4 users with Name, Role, and Status columns.
